梅毒.source_type: baseline anchor (chronic endemic, no discrete onset)
梅毒.justification: Syphilis is a multi-year rising endemic; no discrete outbreak start. Anchor at 2024 W1 represents the start of the surveillance year; lead time on this anchor measures whether each detector flags the 2024 surge before mid-year.
梅毒.caveat: Lead-time semantics for chronic outbreaks are weaker than for acute. The detector that 'fires earliest in 2024' is not necessarily superior; we report it for completeness but exclude it from the D2-vs-D1 ≥2-week decision rule.

麻しん.source_type: JIHS featured bulletin (genotype-based confirmation, week 5 = 15 cases first cluster)
麻しん.justification: Week 5 (Feb 3–9, 2026) is the first week JIHS featured measles in a special bulletin citing genotype B3/D8 imported-case clusters; before W5 the country had only sporadic single cases.
麻しん.caveat: JIHS bulletin is partly IDWR-derived; we accept it because it adds independent genotype confirmation as the trigger for the bulletin (not raw count threshold).

風疹.source_type: peer-reviewed retrospective (IASR Vol.40 No.8, May 2019; Sugishita et al.)
風疹.justification: IASR retrospective analysis defines W30 (Jul 23–29, 2018) as the inflection week in south Kanto: 19 cases, marking start of 2018-19 nationwide outbreak. NIID issued public alert at W33 (Aug 15) but post-hoc epi assigned start to W30.

detector_specs.D0: z-only (log-transformed historic limits, z>=2 medium / z>=3 high)
detector_specs.D1: two-layer (1-case rare 全数把握 + z-rule layer-2)
